flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inver Hills Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Inver Hills Community College rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 (12.2% → 15.7%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Inver Hills Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (47.2% → 56.2%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Inver Hills Community College are 9% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($49.9k vs $45.6k).
